name: Tecmo Bowl
description: Tecmo Bowl is an American football game featuring two teams of eleven players competing to score the most points by advancing the ball down the field and into the opponent's end zone. The game is played from a side-scrolling perspective. Before each offensive play, the player chooses one of four plays. The AI then chooses a play for the defense. The selected plays are revealed simultaneously. On offense, the player directly controls one player; during a running play, the controlled player tries to evade defenders. During a passing play, the quarterback throws to one of the other three offensive players. On defense, the player controls one defensive player and attempts to tackle the ball carrier or intercept a pass. The game progresses through four quarters, with each team having a limited amount of time to score before possession changes. The game includes twelve teams based on the NFL teams, but without official team or player names, instead using city names and player numbers. Each team has a roster of players with varying attributes that affect their performance. The game features limited player substitutions. Strategic play calling and precise timing are key to success. It's a highly stylized, simplified representation of American football.

controls.arrow_up: Moves the controlled player upwards (offensive player selection in passing plays)
controls.arrow_down: Moves the controlled player downwards (offensive player selection in passing plays)
controls.arrow_left: Moves the controlled player to the left
controls.arrow_right: Moves the controlled player to the right
